title: Modern Toasts
body:
**This resource pack replaces the usual toasts with a modern look**

**Minecraft Java 1.20+**

![toast](https://i.postimg.cc/gjMLsfsJ/MT-HD.png)

![review](https://i.postimg.cc/J7KXRk8L/showcase.png)

You can use this resource pack in your Modpacks

[Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/modern-toasts)
